typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		project_code as string,
		function_code as string,
		source_code as string,
		sub_source_code as string,
		data_class_code as string,
		data_sub_class_code as string,
		unit_of_measure as string,
		phase_code as string,
		schedule_resource_code as string,
		work_unit_code as string,
		work_area_code as string,
		activity_code as string,
		IWP_Code as string,
		CWP_Code as string,
		WK1 as double,
		WK2 as double,
		WK3 as double,
		WK4 as double,
		WK5 as double,
		WK6 as double,
		eff_date_wk1 as string,
		eff_date_wk2 as string,
		eff_date_wk3 as string,
		eff_date_wk4 as string,
		eff_date_wk5 as string,
		eff_date_wk6 as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/6WkLAhead/sitepro_6WkLAhead.csv']) ~> source6WkLAheadSiteproStage
source6WkLAheadSiteproStage derive(FileName = concat( 'Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/6WkLAhead/',        substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),        '/',        'Sitepro_6WkLAhead_',        replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),        '.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snk6WkLAheadSiteproRaw
